tooltip.option.bobbieslighthouse.enabled: Enable manual distant island loading around known lodestone anchors.
tooltip.option.bobbieslighthouse.anchor_: Chunks around each lodestone anchor that should be manually loaded from Bobby.
tooltip.option.bobbieslighthouse.lightho: Farthest lodestone anchor distance and render horizon, in chunks.
tooltip.option.bobbieslighthouse.max_act: Maximum number of nearby lodestone anchors rendered at once.
tooltip.option.bobbieslighthouse.max_ext: Maximum extra chunks this mod may keep manually loaded.
tooltip.option.bobbieslighthouse.shape: Shape used for chunks manually loaded around each lodestone anchor.
